data.title: MrBeast
data.description:
SUBSCRIBE FOR A COOKIE!
New MrBeast or MrBeast Gaming video every single Saturday at noon eastern time!
Accomplishments:
- Raised $20,000,000 To Plant 20,000,000 Trees
- Removed 30,000,000 pounds of trash from the ocean
- Helped 2,000 people walk again
- Helped 1,000 blind people see
- Helped 1,000 deaf people hear
- Built wells in Africa
- Built and gave away 100 houses
- Adopted every dog in a shelter (twice)
- Given millions to charity
- Started my own snack company Feastables
- Started my own software company Viewstats
- Started Lunchly, a tasty, better-for-you lunch option
- Gave away a private island (twice)
- Gave away 1 million meals
- I counted to 100k
- Ran a marathon in the world's largest shoes
- Survived 50 hours in Antarctica
- Recreated Squid Game in real life
- Created the largest competition show with 1000 people (Beast Games)
- Gave $5,000,000 to one person
- Passed T-Series to become most subscribed YouTube channel 🥹
you get it, I appreciate all of you so much :)

get.description: 用户最近视频中top10 hashtag的互动数据

data.illustration: The audience is drawn to MrBeast's charitable acts, such as planting trees and helping those in need.
Viewers enjoy watching extreme challenges like surviving in harsh conditions or competing for large prizes.
Many fans are interested in gaming content, especially with MrBeast Gaming videos featuring popular games.
The audience loves entertaining content that includes humor, surprises, and engaging storytelling.
'Feastables' and food-related giveaways attract viewers who enjoy culinary experiences and unique snacks.

data.demographic: Primarily young adults and teenagers who enjoy entertaining content.
Individuals creating similar engaging videos or aspiring YouTubers.
Companies looking to partner for promotions and sponsorships in videos.

real.reason: Analysis shows high engagement rates with meaningful comments indicating authentic follower interaction across multiple videos.

interested.reason: 75% of comments discuss specific video features or express interest in related products, indicating strong purchase intent.

positive.reason: Majority of comments reflect admiration for MrBeast's generosity and creativity, contributing to an overwhelmingly positive sentiment.

expertise.reason: 'Buy Feastables! It tastes amazing' effectively promotes products with engaging visuals and personal endorsements throughout videos.

credibility.reason: High trust established through transparency about sponsorships, though some comments express skepticism about product authenticity.

likability.reason: Strong positive engagement with followers through humor and relatability fosters a loyal community eager to support.

personality_assessment.name: Generosity
personality_assessment.persona: Consistently engages in philanthropic activities, positively impacting communities and inspiring followers to contribute.

personality_assessment.name: Creativity
personality_assessment.persona: Innovatively designs entertaining content that captivates a wide audience, showcasing unique challenges and experiences.

personality_assessment.name: Controversial Stunts
personality_assessment.persona: Occasionally engages in extreme challenges that may raise safety concerns or ethical questions among viewers.

data.name: Celebrity
data.desc: MrBeast is at the pinnacle of influence with a massive subscriber count and high engagement rates. His content spreads widely, and his audience is highly engaged, showing characteristics of a celebrity influencer. His followers are deeply invested in his content, and his influence extends globally.

data.name: Activist
data.desc: MrBeast demonstrates a strong commitment to philanthropy and social impact projects, which resonates deeply with his audience. His charitable acts and community-focused initiatives align with the traits of an activist influencer, as he actively champions causes and engages his audience in meaningful ways.

data.illustration: The audience is drawn to MrBeast's charitable acts, such as planting trees and helping those in need.
Viewers enjoy watching extreme challenges like surviving in harsh conditions or competing for large prizes.
Many fans are interested in gaming content, especially with MrBeast Gaming videos featuring popular games.
The audience loves entertaining content that includes humor, surprises, and engaging storytelling.
'Feastables' and food-related giveaways attract viewers who enjoy culinary experiences and unique snacks.

data.demographic: Primarily young adults and teenagers who enjoy entertaining content.
Individuals creating similar engaging videos or aspiring YouTubers.
Companies looking to partner for promotions and sponsorships in videos.

real.reason: Mixed authenticity with notable spam but also genuine fan interactions.

interested.reason: Moderate product interest with some detailed inquiries amid generic reactions.

positive.reason: Predominantly upbeat sentiment though diluted by repetitive/spammy comments.

expertise.reason: High-quality product showcases with detailed features but lacks consistent demonstration depth.

credibility.reason: Strong brand trust but occasional skepticism over sponsorship transparency in comments.

likability.reason: Exceptional audience rapport with frequent positive interactions and community-building efforts.

personality_assessment.name: Inspirational
personality_assessment.persona: Consistently motivates and uplifts followers with high-energy content and positive messaging.

personality_assessment.name: Global Appeal
personality_assessment.persona: Engages a diverse international audience with culturally inclusive content and multilingual interactions.

personality_assessment.name: Controversial
personality_assessment.persona: Occasionally sparks debates or receives negative comments due to polarizing content or brand stances.

data.name: Announcer
data.desc: Nike fits the Announcer personality type because they broadcast great content that spreads widely, especially around major events like Breaking4. Their broad, diverse audience values their content, and they serve as an important source of information in the sports and fitness industry.

data.name: Tastemaker
data.desc: Nike also aligns with the Tastemaker personality type as they know what their audience likes and don't just follow trends—they set them. Their content, from sneaker releases to athlete showcases, earns respect and engagement from their network, demonstrating their ability to influence and lead in their niche.

data.illustration: The audience is drawn to MrBeast's charitable acts, such as planting trees and helping those in need.
Viewers enjoy watching extreme challenges like surviving in harsh conditions or competing for large prizes.
Many fans are interested in gaming content, especially with MrBeast Gaming videos featuring popular games.
The audience loves entertaining content that includes humor, surprises, and engaging storytelling.
'Feastables' and food-related giveaways attract viewers who enjoy culinary experiences and unique snacks.

data.demographic: Primarily young adults and teenagers who enjoy entertaining content.
Individuals creating similar engaging videos or aspiring YouTubers.
Companies looking to partner for promotions and sponsorships in videos.

real.reason: Analysis shows that approximately 80% of comments are relevant and contextually engaged with Nike's content.

interested.reason: 65% of comments express interest in products or features, indicating a solid level of purchase intent.

positive.reason: 70% positive sentiment in comments suggests overall appreciation for Nike's branding efforts despite recent controversies.

expertise.reason: 'Breaking4' campaign effectively showcases product benefits through high-profile athlete endorsements, enhancing purchase intent.

credibility.reason: 'Nike's transparency in partnerships is commendable, but recent controversies have led to some skepticism among followers.'

likability.reason: 'High engagement rates indicate positive community interaction; however, negative comments reflect divided opinions on brand actions.'

personality_assessment.name: Resilience
personality_assessment.persona: Demonstrates strong perseverance and determination, inspiring followers to push their limits in sports and fitness.

personality_assessment.name: Global Reach
personality_assessment.persona: Engages a diverse audience across multiple cultures, promoting inclusivity and unity through sports.

personality_assessment.name: Controversial Stance
personality_assessment.persona: Has faced backlash for political statements, leading to potential alienation of segments of the audience.

data.name: Announcer
data.desc: Nike fits the Announcer personality type because they broadcast great content that spreads widely, especially around major events like Breaking4. Their broad, diverse audience values their content, and they serve as an important source of information in the sports and fitness industry.

data.name: Tastemaker
data.desc: Nike also aligns with the Tastemaker personality type as they know what their audience likes and don't just follow trends—they set them. Their content, from sneaker releases to athlete showcases, earns respect and engagement from their network, demonstrating their ability to influence and lead in their niche.
